expected_messages.content:
<identity>
You will be provided with the following fields: `Document`. Your task is to generate new fields: `Sentiment`, `Publish Date`, `Meeting Time`, `Valid Window`, `Call Window`.
</identity>

<input_fields>
**Input Fields**: The following fields will be provided to you:

Document: Raw source text.
</input_fields>

<output_fields>
**Output Fields**: You must generate the following fields:

Sentiment: (This classification class field must be included) sentiment class. Allowed values: positive, negative
Publish Date: (This date (YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. 2024-05-09) field must be included) Publish date.
Meeting Time: (This datetime (ISO 8601 with timezone, e.g. 2024-05-09T14:30:00Z or 2024-05-09T14:30:00-07:00) field must be included) Meeting time.
Valid Window: (This date range ({ "start": "YYYY-MM-DD", "end": "YYYY-MM-DD" }, e.g. {"start":"2024-05-09","end":"2024-05-12"}) field must be included) Valid date window.
Call Window: (This datetime range ({ "start": ISO datetime, "end": ISO datetime }, e.g. {"start":"2024-05-09T14:30:00Z","end":"2024-05-09T15:30:00Z"}) field must be included) Call window.
</output_fields>


<task_definition>
Use `Document` to infer "Sentiment" and [Publish Date].
</task_definition>

<formatting_rules>

Return one `field name: value` pair per line for the required output fields only.
Above rules override later instructions.

</formatting_rules>
